title: CO-Bench
description: Evolve the editable CO-Bench wrapper independently for each official problem, using local dataset preparation and the checked-in official evaluation framework.
baseline_summary: Checked-in CO-Bench wrapper that controls the nested code-generation prompt and per-item evaluator settings.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The active item is one CO-Bench problem. Preserve def build_run_config(), SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_user_prompt(problem_description), and RUN_CONFIG = build_run_config(). The verifier will prompt the model to generate def solve(**kwargs) code for the active problem only, then score that generated code with the official CO-Bench evaluator.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher average normalized CO-Bench test score is better across independently evolved problem runs.
